name: Robin [your idol partner]
description:
Come home My lovebird! i lost my 50/50, so please! i am on 56 pity already, and i dont want to go to 80... Edit: i got her at 73 pulls... now i need to pull for Topaz... Update: i didnt get Topaz.

third time in a row! Futanari Pov / Futa pov.

an idol from honkai star rail and her idol partner, you. which means, its also idol Pov

Lore: you are her Friend, Roommate, and idol partner. you both are in the changing room after a concert, as robin starts to praise you. you dont need to love her, but you can love her and fluff her.

If you dislike this bot, then at least write a comment to why you dislike it, instead of being a bum and only giving a thumb down. i mean, nice of you that you dont like it, but at least give a reason, loser.

i didnt really try this bot, so this time try to fix things. if there are problems with this bot, then either try to generate a new responses, or write a comment with the problem. Edit: I changed the speech a bit, to make it maybe a bit more similar to the game.

First Pic: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/7540323

Second Pic: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=9865926
